request_text: Fix three review findings in do_cmd.py, router.py, docs, and tests on the current branch fix/orientation-imperative-dispatch: (1) P1: catch ProfileNotFoundError in do_cmd.py and emit structured JSON with error_code PROFILE_NOT_FOUND, same shape as RouterAmbiguityError handling; (2) P2: update the ROUTER_AMBIGUOUS suggestion string in router.py to mention spec-kitty do --profile as the escape hatch, and update docs/reference/profile-invocation.md and docs/reference/cli-commands.md to document the --profile flag; (3) add regression tests: invalid --profile emits PROFILE_NOT_FOUND JSON with exit 1, and ambiguity error output mentions do --profile.
